title: Textured Risograph
description: Ce style imite l'illustration éditoriale contemporaine avec une esthétique distincte d'impression risographe. Il présente des perspectives aplaties en fausse isométrie, des aplats de couleurs avec une forte texture de grain uniforme, et un éclairage graphique stylisé avec des ombres portées à bords nets. De subtiles irrégularités tracées à la main et des accents de contours blancs lui confèrent un aspect chaleureux et tactile, à la croisée du numérique et du traditionnel.
prompt: Digital editorial illustration mimicking risograph printing and chalk pastel drawing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Render the scene using flat color blocking dominated by {{primary_color}}, offset by {{accent_color}} details and {{secondary_color}} supporting tones. Apply a heavy, uniform noise and stipple grain texture universally across all surfaces, giving the artwork a highly tactile, printed materiality. Lighting is explicitly stylized and graphic: use visible, geometric light cones layered as semi-transparent color blocks, casting hard-edged, solid drop shadows with zero blur or gradient. Form is defined primarily by color contrast rather than heavy line art, though selective, thin white contour lines are used to highlight delicate elements, wires, or overlapping forms. Edges of shapes should exhibit a subtle, hand-drawn wobble, avoiding perfectly sterile vector lines to maintain an organic, indie-editorial feel. Perspective is intentionally flattened, leaning toward a faux-isometric or orthographic tilt that arranges elements in a neat, slightly overlapping composition. The overall atmosphere is cozy, structured, and contemporary. digital editorial illustration, risograph aesthetic, heavy noise texture, flat color blocking, faux-isometric perspective, hard-edged drop shadows, graphic light cones, chalk pastel texture, hand-drawn edges, white contour accents, contemporary indie art, tactile printmaking feel, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
description_en: This style mimics contemporary editorial illustration with a distinct risograph print aesthetic. It features flattened, faux-isometric perspectives, flat color blocking with a heavy uniform noise texture, and stylized graphic lighting with hard-edged drop shadows. Subtle hand-drawn edge wobbles and white contour accents give it a cozy, tactile digital-traditional crossover feel.
description_fr: Ce style imite l'illustration éditoriale contemporaine avec une esthétique distincte d'impression risographe. Il présente des perspectives aplaties en fausse isométrie, des aplats de couleurs avec une forte texture de grain uniforme, et un éclairage graphique stylisé avec des ombres portées à bords nets. De subtiles irrégularités tracées à la main et des accents de contours blancs lui confèrent un aspect chaleureux et tactile, à la croisée du numérique et du traditionnel.
background_prompt: A completely empty background environment mimicking contemporary editorial risograph illustrations. The scene features a flattened, faux-isometric perspective composed of overlapping flat color planes in {{primary_color}}, {{secondary_color}}, and {{accent_color}}. The entire surface is coated in a heavy, uniform noise and stipple grain texture, giving a tactile, chalky printmaking feel. Stylized, hard-edged graphic light cones intersect with sharp, unblurred solid drop shadows. Subtle hand-drawn wobbles on the color boundaries replace sterile straight lines.
prompt_removebg: Digital editorial illustration mimicking risograph printing and chalk pastel drawing. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Render the scene against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop, allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame (cropped by the image boundaries). Render the scene using flat color blocking dominated by {{primary_color}}, offset by {{accent_color}} details and {{secondary_color}} supporting tones. Apply a heavy, uniform noise and stipple grain texture universally across all surfaces, giving the artwork a highly tactile, printed materiality. Lighting is explicitly stylized and graphic: use visible, geometric light cones layered as semi-transparent color blocks, casting hard-edged, solid drop shadows with zero blur or gradient onto the {{background_color}} surface. Form is defined primarily by color contrast rather than heavy line art, though selective, thin white contour lines are used to highlight delicate elements, wires, or overlapping forms. Edges of shapes should exhibit a subtle, hand-drawn wobble, avoiding perfectly sterile vector lines to maintain an organic, indie-editorial feel. Perspective is intentionally flattened, leaning toward a faux-isometric or orthographic tilt that arranges elements in a neat, slightly overlapping composition. The overall atmosphere is cozy, structured, and contemporary. digital editorial illustration, risograph aesthetic, heavy noise texture, flat color blocking, faux-isometric perspective, hard-edged drop shadows, graphic light cones, chalk pastel texture, hand-drawn edges, white contour accents, contemporary indie art, tactile printmaking feel
background_prompt_removebg: A completely empty background environment mimicking contemporary editorial risograph illustrations. The scene features a flattened, faux-isometric perspective composed of overlapping flat color planes in {{primary_color}}, {{secondary_color}}, and {{accent_color}}. The entire surface is coated in a heavy, uniform noise and stipple grain texture, giving a tactile, chalky printmaking feel. Stylized, hard-edged graphic light cones intersect with sharp, unblurred solid drop shadows. Subtle hand-drawn wobbles on the color boundaries replace sterile straight lines. This environment transitions into a clean {{background_color}} surface, featuring a decorative foreground overlay of thin, stylized white contour lines and organic geometric frames that sit in front of the invisible subject, interacting playfully with the {{background_color}} backdrop.
